title: One error during build for "7.2.0-rc1.3211-pthreads as of Jan 28 2015"
description:
I got one build error for the latest dev code.
The error occurs in the file toptitpcd.output, and here it is:
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, value DECIMAL(10, 2) CHECK (value >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test Item', 10.50);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (2, 'Another Item', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
UPDATE test_table SET value = COALESCE(value, 0) + 1 WHERE id = 1;
